title: rubus amygdalanthus
intro: Rubus amygdalinus, also known as the Wild Raspberry, is a type of bramble or thorny shrub that belongs to the Rubus genus. The plant contains amygdalin, a compound with medicinal properties, which is used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Rubus amygdalinus include its ability to inhibit the growth of cancer cells and its potential to treat digestive issues and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Rubus amygdalinus can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system.
